title: Five Hundred Miles
group_key: five hundred miles|justin timberlake,carey mulligan,stark sands

lyrics.text: If you missed the train I'm on,
lyrics.translation: 若你错过了我搭乘的那班列车

lyrics.text: You will know that I am gone,
lyrics.translation: 你应明白我已离开

lyrics.text: You can hear the whistle blow a hundred miles.
lyrics.translation: 你听那绵延百里的汽笛

lyrics.text: A hundred miles, a hundred miles,
lyrics.translation: 一百英里又一百英里 载我远去

lyrics.text: A hundred miles, A hundred miles,
lyrics.translation: 一百英里又一百英里 再回不去

lyrics.text: You can hear the whistle blow A hundred miles.
lyrics.translation: 那绵延百里的汽笛会告诉你我离去的讯息

lyrics.text: Lord, I'm one, Lord, I'm two, Lord,
lyrics.translation: 上帝啊，一百英里 两百英里 渐渐远去

lyrics.text: I'm three, Lord, I'm four, Lord,
lyrics.translation: 三百英里 上帝啊，四百英里 再回不去

lyrics.text: I'm five hundred miles away from home.
lyrics.translation: 不知不觉我便已离家五百英里

lyrics.text: Away from home, away from home,
lyrics.translation: 背负一切 离乡背井

lyrics.text: away from home, away from home,
lyrics.translation: 家在远方 我却再难回去

lyrics.text: Lord, I'm five hundred miles away from home
lyrics.translation: 上帝啊 家乡离我已有五百英里

lyrics.text: Not a shirt on my back,
lyrics.translation: 如今我衣衫褴褛

lyrics.text: Not a penny to my name.
lyrics.translation: 依旧是一文不名

lyrics.text: Lord. I can't go back home this a-way.
lyrics.translation: 上帝啊 我怎能就这样回到家去

lyrics.text: This a-way, this a-way,
lyrics.translation: 这般潦倒 这般困顿

lyrics.text: This a-way, this a-way,
lyrics.translation: 这般处境 惨惨戚戚

lyrics.text: Lord, I can't go back home this a-way.
lyrics.translation: 这样的我又怎好意思回到家去

lyrics.text: If you missed the train I'm on,
lyrics.translation: 若那列车开动让我来不及见你

lyrics.text: You will know that I am gone,
lyrics.translation: 那就说明我已独自黯然离去

lyrics.text: You can hear the whistle blow A hundred miles.
lyrics.translation: 你听那绵延百里的汽笛

lyrics.text: A hundred miles.
lyrics.translation: 一百英里

lyrics.text: A hundred miles.
lyrics.translation: 又一百英里 载我远去

lyrics.text: A hundred miles.
lyrics.translation: 一百英里

lyrics.text: A hundred miles.
lyrics.translation: 又一百英里 再回不去

lyrics.text: You can hear the whistle blow a hundred miles
lyrics.translation: 你听那绵延百里的汽笛 声渐远去

lyrics.text: You can hear the whistle blow a hundred miles
lyrics.translation: 告诉着你我已离乡背井 不见归期

lyrics.text: You can hear the whistle blow a hundred miles
lyrics.translation: 那绵延百里的汽笛 一如我的叹息

source_file: Five Hundred Miles - Justin Timberlake,Carey Mulligan,Stark Sands.lrc
